job_title: Associate General Counsel – Partnerships and Commercial
job_description:
• Experience: 12+ years of legal experience with a strong emphasis on complex commercial, partnership, and technology transactions.
• A track record advising on automotive, hardware, cloud services, or high-scale tech collaborations is highly preferred.
• Negotiation Prowess: Proven track record of leading high-value ($100M+) negotiations with sophisticated global partners, including experience with joint collaboration governance, revenue sharing agreements, and complex commercial constructs.
• Degree from an ABA-approved law school and an active member in good standing of at least one U.
• Leadership: Experience managing legal professionals and outside counsel budgets for large-scale, international engagements.
• Perform a broad range of legal matters and general business matters based on the needs of the company, as assigned.
• Support our Commercial Fleet Sales business and legal needs of our on-going partnerships.
• Background in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field.

• Minimum QualificationsStrong software engineering fundamentals and systems design skills.
• Experience developing applications or frameworks using Apple technologies.
• Strong collaboration and communication skillsAbility to work effectively in ambiguous and exploratory environments.
